name: DW · Mkt Web Session
sql:
SELECT
    gs                                                                          AS session_id,
    md5('SESSION' || gs::text)                                                  AS session_guid,
    CASE WHEN (('x'||substr(md5('WSKNOWN'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 10) < 6  -- 60% known visitors
         THEN 1 + (('x'||substr(md5('WSCUST'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 2000)
         ELSE NULL END                                                          AS customer_id,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('WSCMP'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 100)      AS campaign_id,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('WSCHAN'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 12)      AS channel_id,
    (CURRENT_DATE - (('x'||substr(md5('WSDATE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 180)::int) AS session_date,
    (ARRAY['Desktop','Mobile','Tablet'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('WSDEV'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 3)]  AS device_type,
    (('x'||substr(md5('WSPAGES'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 25) + 1     AS page_views,
    (('x'||substr(md5('WSDUR'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 1800) + 5     AS duration_seconds,
    ((('x'||substr(md5('WSBOUNCE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 100) < 35) AS bounced,
    ((('x'||substr(md5('WSCONV'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 100) < 8)   AS converted
FROM generate_series(1, 10000) AS gs
